# Repetition and consistency methods <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../../_setup.R")){source("../../_setup.R")}
```

## Internal consistency of summary statistics

- Are M/SD/N consistent throughout the article?
- Are M/SD/N consistent between whole sample vs subgroups?

## Abstract vs. results

- Does the result in the abstract match the results section?
- Does the abstract label the preregistered analysis/primary outcome?

## Tables vs. text

- Do the tables match the text?

## Introduction vs. analysis

- Does the explanans/explanandum switch between intro and analysis?

## Over-representation of suspicious values

- Over-representation of reported round or repeated difference scores, mean/SD/quartiles between groups, etc.

## Preregistration vs. paper

- Does the prereg match the paper?

## SEM consistency

- SEM and consistency of degrees of freedom with parameters and indicators
